uses: Micrococca berberidea is traditionally used in medicine for its purported antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's extracts are believed to possess antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. The plant's leaves and stems are typically harvested and used in the preparation of herbal remedies. Further research is needed to fully understand the potential medicinal benefits and risks associated with Micrococca berberidea.
